name: Zoom

rateLimits.notes: Rate limits vary by endpoint classification and account tier.

scim.notes: Zoom SCIM 2.0 API supports user and group provisioning. Available for Business and above plans.

sdk.notes: No official Zoom REST API npm client SDK. @zoom/rivet is the Node.js SDK. Most developers use direct HTTP calls or community wrappers for REST API operations.

webhooks.registrationEndpoint: Configured via Zoom Marketplace App settings (Feature > Event Subscriptions)
webhooks.notes: Webhooks require URL validation via a challenge-response check. Events are signed with a secret token for verification.

sandbox.notes: No free developer sandbox. Business and above accounts can request a sub-account as a sandbox from Zoom sales. Free/Pro accounts must test against their own account.

needs_verification: Exact @zoom/rivet npm package capabilities for user management (may be limited to meeting SDK)
Whether SCIM 2.0 endpoint base URL is exactly https://api.zoom.us/scim2/ or varies
Server-to-Server OAuth client_credentials grant type scope requirements for user management
